mapper.update:
update TB_TRADER_CHNL_CONFIG
bank_customer_id = #{bankCustomerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_chnl_name = #{bankChnlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_account_name = #{bankAccountName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_contract_file = #{bankContractFile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
auth_contract_file = #{authContractFile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
limit_balance = #{limitBalance,jdbcType=BIGINT},
single_max_recharge = #{singleMaxRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where oid_partner = #{oidPartner,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and bank_chnl = #{bankChnl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update TB_TRADER_CHNL_CONFIG set bank_customer_id = #{bankCustomerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_chnl_name = #{bankChnlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account_name = #{bankAccountName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_contract_file = #{bankContractFile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, auth_contract_file = #{authContractFile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, limit_balance = #{limitBalance,jdbcType=BIGINT}, single_max_recharge = #{singleMaxRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where oid_partner = #{oidPartner,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and bank_chnl = #{bankChnl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
